title: Baked Croatian White Fish
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring Croatian white fish baked to perfection. Serve with a side of vegetables or salad for a well-rounded meal.

ingredients.name: Croatian White Fish
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen, about 6 oz each

ingredients.name: Rapidly Cooked Croissant Crumbs
ingredients.notes: Make from croissant dough or use store-bought

ingredients.name: White Wine
ingredients.notes: Dry white wine, for added flavor

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: Unsalted, for greasing the baking dish

ingredients.name: Bisque
ingredients.notes: Fish bisque or make your own from fish stock and vegetables

ingredients.name: Fresh Parsley
ingredients.notes: Optional, for added flavor and color

instructions: Grease a baking dish with 2 tbsp of butter.
Season the fish with salt and place in the baking dish.
Pour the white wine over the fish.
Sprinkle the rapidly cooked croissant crumbs over the fish.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Serve with a side of vegetables or salad.
Drizzle with fish bisque and garnish with parsley, if desired.
